compiled_state.title: [075a-b781] RED: Write verification test asserting zero plugins/dso comment references in plugin tree
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
Story: 075a-b781

## What to do
Create tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-comment-refs.sh — a RED bash test that asserts zero plugins/dso references remain in comment lines under plugins/dso/.

## Test behavior
The test runs BEFORE migration, so it MUST fail (RED) initially.

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Test: no plugins/dso references in comment lines within plugins/dso/
MATCHES=$(grep -rn '# .*plugins/dso' plugins/dso/ --include='*.sh' | grep -v 'plugin-self-ref-ok')
if [ -n "$MATCHES" ]; then
  echo 'FAIL: Found plugins/dso references in comment lines:'
  echo "$MATCHES"
  exit 1
fi
echo 'PASS: Zero plugins/dso comment references found'
```

## Also add to .test-index
Add this entry to .test-index (using fuzzy mapping so test is run when any .sh under plugins/dso/ changes):
```
plugins/dso/scripts/*.sh:tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-comment-refs.sh
plugins/dso/hooks/**/*.sh:tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-comment-refs.sh
```

## Files to create
- tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-comment-refs.sh (executable bit required: chmod +x)
- Update .test-index with mappings above

## testing_mode: RED
Must fail before migration is run.
